name: putnam_1974_a4
explanation:
have h_main : ∀ n : ℕ, (n : ℚ) * ↑((n - 1).choose ⌊n / 2⌋₊) = (n : ℚ) * ↑(Nat.choose (n - 1) ((n - 1) / 2)) := by
  intro n
  have h₁ : (n - 1).choose ⌊n / 2⌋₊ = Nat.choose (n - 1) ((n - 1) / 2) := by
    have h₂ : ⌊n / 2⌋₊ = n / 2 := by
      rfl
    rw [h₂]
    have h₃ : (n - 1).choose (n / 2) = Nat.choose (n - 1) ((n - 1) / 2) := by
      have h₄ : (n - 1).choose (n / 2) = Nat.choose (n - 1) ((n - 1) / 2) := by

        have h₅ : (n - 1).choose (n / 2) = Nat.choose (n - 1) ((n - 1) - (n / 2)) := by
          rw [← Nat.choose_symm_of_eq_add]
          <;>
          (try omega) <;>
          (try
            {
              cases n with
              | zero => simp
              | succ n =>
                cases n with
                | zero => simp
                | succ n =>
                  simp [Nat.div_eq_of_lt, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm]
                  <;> ring_nf at * <;> omega
            })
        have h₆ : (n - 1) - (n / 2) = (n - 1) / 2 := by
          have h₇ : n / 2 + (n - 1) / 2 = n - 1 := by
            have h₈ : n / 2 + (n - 1) / 2 = n - 1 := by
              have h₉ : n / 2 + (n - 1) / 2 = n - 1 := by
                cases n with
                | zero => simp
                | succ n =>
                  cases n with
                  | zero => simp
                  | succ n =>
                    simp [Nat.div_eq_of_lt, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm]
                    <;> ring_nf at * <;>
                    (try omega) <;>
                    (try
                      {
                        omega
                      })
              exact h₉
            exact h₈
          have h₁₀ : (n - 1) - (n / 2) = (n - 1) / 2 := by
            have h₁₁ : n / 2 + (n - 1) / 2 = n - 1 := by
              omega
            have h₁₂ : (n - 1) - (n / 2) = (n - 1) / 2 := by
              omega
            exact h₁₂
          exact h₁₀
        rw [h₆] at h₅
        exact h₅
      exact h₄
    exact h₃
  rw [h₁]
  <;>
  simp [mul_assoc]
  <;>
  ring_nf
  <;>
  norm_num
  <;>
  field_simp
  <;>
  ring_nf
  <;>
  norm_cast

have h_final : ((fun n ↦ (1 : ℚ) / (2 ^ (n - 1)) * (n * (n - 1).choose ⌊n / 2⌋₊)) : ℕ → ℚ) = (fun n => (↑n * ↑(Nat.choose (n - 1) ((n - 1) / 2)) / ↑(2 ^ (n - 1)) : ℚ) : ℕ → ℚ) := by
  funext n
  have h₁ : (n : ℚ) * ↑((n - 1).choose ⌊n / 2⌋₊) = (n : ℚ) * ↑(Nat.choose (n - 1) ((n - 1) / 2)) := h_main n
  have h₂ : (1 : ℚ) / (2 ^ (n - 1)) * (n * (n - 1).choose ⌊n / 2⌋₊) = (↑n * ↑(Nat.choose (n - 1) ((n - 1) / 2)) / ↑(2 ^ (n - 1)) : ℚ) := by
    calc
      (1 : ℚ) / (2 ^ (n - 1)) * (n * (n - 1).choose ⌊n / 2⌋₊) = (n : ℚ) * ↑((n - 1).choose ⌊n / 2⌋₊) / (2 ^ (n - 1) : ℚ) := by
        field_simp [pow_ne_zero]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> norm_cast
        <;> simp_all [Nat.choose_zero_right, Nat.choose_one_right]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> norm_num
        <;> field_simp [pow_ne_zero]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> norm_cast
      _ = (n : ℚ) * ↑(Nat.choose (n - 1) ((n - 1) / 2)) / (2 ^ (n - 1) : ℚ) := by
        rw [h₁]
      _ = (↑n * ↑(Nat.choose (n - 1) ((n - 1) / 2)) / ↑(2 ^ (n - 1)) : ℚ) := by
        simp [div_eq_mul_inv]
        <;> field_simp [pow_ne_zero]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> norm_cast
        <;> simp_all [Nat.choose_zero_right, Nat.choose_one_right]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> norm_num
  exact h₂
exact h_final
